languages.text: {n}Десяток пуль с отвратительным хрустом прошивают ваше тело. Последнее, что предстает вашему взору, — удаляющаяся фигура механического чудовища, не ведающего, что оно пролило кровь собственного рода.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Десяток пуль с отвратительным хрустом прошивают ваше тело. Последнее, что предстает вашему взору, — удаляющаяся фигура механического чудовища, не ведающего, что оно пролило кровь собственного рода.{/n}

languages.text: {n}A dozen bullets pierce your body with a repulsive crunch. The last thing you see is the departing figure of that mechanical monster, unaware that it has spilled the blood of its own kin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Десяток пуль с отвратительным хрустом прошивают ваше тело. Последнее, что предстает вашему взору, — удаляющаяся фигура механического чудовища, не ведающего, что оно пролило кровь собственного рода.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A dozen bullets pierce your body with a repulsive crunch. The last thing you see is the departing figure of that mechanical monster, unaware that it has spilled the blood of its own kin.{/n}

{n}A dozen bullets pierce your body with a repulsive crunch. The last thing you see is the departing figure of that mechanical monster, unaware that it has spilled the blood of its own kin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ein Dutzend Kugeln durchlöchert deinen Körper mit einem abscheulichen Knirschen. Das Letzte, was du siehst, ist die Silhouette des mechanischen Monsters, das nicht ahnt, dass es gerade sein eigenes Blut vergossen hat.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dozen bullets pierce your body with a repulsive crunch. The last thing you see is the departing figure of that mechanical monster, unaware that it has spilled the blood of its own kin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ein Dutzend Kugeln durchlöchert deinen Körper mit einem abscheulichen Knirschen. Das Letzte, was du siehst, ist die Silhouette des mechanischen Monsters, das nicht ahnt, dass es gerade sein eigenes Blut vergossen hat.{/n}

languages.text: {n}十几发子弹伴随着令人作呕的嘎吱声穿透了你的身体。你最后看到的，是那个机械怪物离去的背影，它浑然不知自己已沾染同族人的鲜血。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dozen bullets pierce your body with a repulsive crunch. The last thing you see is the departing figure of that mechanical monster, unaware that it has spilled the blood of its own kin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}十几发子弹伴随着令人作呕的嘎吱声穿透了你的身体。你最后看到的，是那个机械怪物离去的背影，它浑然不知自己已沾染同族人的鲜血。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une dizaine de balles vous transpercent , brisant vos os avec autant de craquements écœurants. Dans votre dernière vision, vous apercevez la silhouette de cette monstruosité mécanique qui s'éloigne, votre aïeul ignorant qu'il vient de verser le sang de sa propre descendance.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dozen bullets pierce your body with a repulsive crunch. The last thing you see is the departing figure of that mechanical monster, unaware that it has spilled the blood of its own kin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Une dizaine de balles vous transpercent , brisant vos os avec autant de craquements écœurants. Dans votre dernière vision, vous apercevez la silhouette de cette monstruosité mécanique qui s'éloigne, votre aïeul ignorant qu'il vient de verser le sang de sa propre descendance.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Una docena de balas atraviesan tu cuerpo con un repulsivo crujido. Lo último que ves es la figura de ese monstruo mecánico al darte la espalda, sin darse cuenta de que ha derramado la sangre de su propia estirpe.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dozen bullets pierce your body with a repulsive crunch. The last thing you see is the departing figure of that mechanical monster, unaware that it has spilled the blood of its own kin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Una docena de balas atraviesan tu cuerpo con un repulsivo crujido. Lo último que ves es la figura de ese monstruo mecánico al darte la espalda, sin darse cuenta de que ha derramado la sangre de su propia estirpe.{/n}

languages.text: {n}On kadar mermi, iğrenç bir çatırtıyla bedenini delip geçiyor. Gördüğün son şey, kendi soydaşının kanını döktüğünden habersiz o mekanik canavarın uzaklaşan figürü oluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dozen bullets pierce your body with a repulsive crunch. The last thing you see is the departing figure of that mechanical monster, unaware that it has spilled the blood of its own kin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}On kadar mermi, iğrenç bir çatırtıyla bedenini delip geçiyor. Gördüğün son şey, kendi soydaşının kanını döktüğünden habersiz o mekanik canavarın uzaklaşan figürü oluyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}機械的な怪物が、仲間の血を流しながら去っていく姿が、最後の視界に映る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A dozen bullets pierce your body with a repulsive crunch. The last thing you see is the departing figure of that mechanical monster, unaware that it has spilled the blood of its own kin.{/n}
